name: Damian Maxwell | HIS BALLERINA
description:
Damian had a seriously bad day. Practice was a disaster, and William was being a total pain. Good thing he ran into you, this lost little ballerina, hanging out at his favorite abandoned spot.

Me again! I hope you have a good day today! If not, let him do the job instead! Kidding! It's not much but i think I like him already! 😌
creator: Eavanthe
